category_resolution.reason: Primary objective is DTC purchase via QR scan. CAT-5 controls S1 hook type, S5 closing structure, and end card QR priority. CAT-1 contributes S2/S3 product intimacy and hero shot style.

audio.lyria_prompt: 50-65 BPM, minimal ambient, single piano motif, no strings, no percussion. Clinical and precise. Nils Frahm Spaces energy — silence is part of the composition. [intro] 0:00-0:05 sparse, single felt piano key, no drums, near-silence between notes. [verse] 0:05-0:12 50% density, piano melody develops, clear midrange space for VO, no competing elements. [pre-chorus] 0:12-0:20 60% density, rising pad built from sustained piano harmonics only — no new instruments. [chorus] 0:20-0:26 100% density achieved through harmonic fullness and piano intensity — no percussion, no drums, no bass drop. [outro] 0:26-0:28 30% density, single sustained piano note with long reverb tail. [end] 0:28-0:30 15-20% only — near silence, faint piano resonance for QR scan.

vo_script.line: Ascorbyl Glucoside. Stable Vitamin C. No fragrance. No compromise.
vo_script.delivery: Flat, clinical, direct. Each clause separated by a beat. No warmth performance — let the ingredients speak.

vo_script.line: Twelve percent. Dermatologist-tested. Visible results in fourteen days.
vo_script.delivery: Precise and authoritative. Slight pause between each claim. speaking_rate: 0.95
vo_script.s3_note: speaking_rate 0.95 — slightly slower for S3 core benefit line adds conviction

vo_script.delivery: Steady, confident. The Ordinary's core brand promise — no drama.
